faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our services

delivery.question: How long does delivery take?
delivery.answer: Delivery time depends on the type of project and quantity. On average, banners and large format are delivered in 3-5 business days. For urgent orders, contact us via WhatsApp.

shipping.question: Do you ship outside of Acapulco?
shipping.answer: Yes, we ship to all of Mexico. You can also pick up your order directly at our offices.

formats.question: What file formats do you accept?
formats.answer: We accept PDF, AI, PSD, high resolution JPG. If you don't have the right file, our design team can help (additional cost).

samples.question: Can I request a sample before the full order?
samples.answer: Yes, for large orders we offer material and print quality samples. Contact us for more details.

design.question: Do you offer graphic design?
design.answer: Yes, we have a design service. If you don't have your final artwork, quote it along with your print project.

payment.question: What are the payment methods?
payment.answer: We accept wire transfer, bank deposit and cash payment (on delivery or pickup).

warranty.question: What warranty do the jobs have?
warranty.answer: We guarantee print and material quality. If there's a manufacturing defect, we replace it at no cost.

hours.question: What hours can I contact you?
hours.answer: Our business hours are 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday to Friday. After hours, leave us a message and we'll respond the next business day.

locations.title: Our Locations
locations.subtitle: Visit us at any of our offices or contact us directly
